name: list_pages
description: Lists the pages (diagrams) in a local .drawio file without loading full page content. Returns each page's index, id, name, and approximate stored size in bytes. Call this first on large multi-page files before get_page/set_page, so only the page you actually need gets loaded into context.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the local file. Must end in .drawio or .xml.
